things.name: Market Square (Rynek)
things.description: One of Central Europe's most beautiful Gothic town squares with the Old Town Hall

things.name: Centennial Hall
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage early 20th-century reinforced concrete masterpiece by Max Berg

things.name: Wroclaw Cathedral
things.description: Gothic cathedral on Cathedral Island with twin towers and lift to panoramic views

things.name: Panorama of the Battle of Raclawice
things.description: Immersive 1794 battle panorama, the only rotunda painting still in its original rotunda

things.name: Wroclaw Dwarfs Trail
things.description: Over 350 tiny bronze gnomes hidden across the city in a charming scavenger hunt

things.name: National Museum Wroclaw
things.description: Outstanding art collection with the spectacular Panorama of Raclawice

things.name: Afrykarium
things.description: World's only oceanarium dedicated exclusively to African aquatic ecosystems

things.name: Sand Island (Ostrow Tumski)
things.description: Cathedral Island, the oldest part of Wroclaw with medieval churches and gas lamps

things.name: Botanical Garden
things.description: Beautiful 19th-century botanical garden with over 7,000 species

things.name: Old Town Hall
things.description: Gothic masterpiece considered the most beautiful Gothic building in Silesia
